title: European Shares Climb Amid AI Optimism and Geopolitical Tensions
description: European shares saw gains as optimism around artificial intelligence countered worries over U.S.-Iran peace talks and an impending U.S.-China summit. The STOXX 600 index rose by 0.4%, powered by Britain's unexpected economic growth while concerns about higher oil prices and inflation persisted.
content: European shares saw an uptick on Thursday, fueled by optimism surrounding artificial intelligence, which helped counter balance the apprehension related to a stalemate in the U.S.-Iran peace discussions. Meanwhile, an upcoming high-stake summit betwe... [954 chars]

title: Who is Sanjay Mehrotra? the only Indian to join Trump’s elite China delegation
description: American corporate executives attending meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping. The two-day summit in Beijing comes at a critical time in US-China relations, particularly as tensions intensify over semiconductors, artificial intelligence, trade restrictions and technology supply chains.

title: Cisco Announces Layoffs Of 4,000 Jobs To Accelerate AI Focus
description: Cisco has announced plans to eliminate fewer than 4,000 jobs globally, representing less than 5 percent of its workforce, as part of a restructuring to sharpen focus on artificial intelligence and high-growth areas. The layoffs were disclosed alongside strong Q3 FY26 results, with record revenue of 15.8 billion dollars, up 12 percent year-on-year. Affected employees will receive severance.
content: New Delhi: Cisco, a global technology conglomerate, has announced plans to cut fewer than 4,000 jobs globally as part of a restructuring exercise aimed at sharpening its focus on artificial intelligence (AI) and other high-growth technology areas. Th... [1708 chars]

description: Shenzhen Adtek Technology Co. is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a wave of Chinese listings by businesses related to data centers and artificial intelligence.

title: Revolutionizing the Art Market: The Artprice Manifesto
description: The Artprice Manifesto introduces 22 rules aiming to bring transparency and trust to the Art Market. It emphasizes the importance of qualified art data, documentation, and technological integration to ensure a fair and global marketplace, especially in the context of accelerating digitalization and artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI in enterprise artificial intelligence race
description: New data reveals Anthropic has surpassed OpenAI in enterprise AI spending, with 34.4% of surveyed companies paying for its products in April. This shift is largely driven by demand for Anthropic's AI coding assistant, Claude Code, marking a significant disruption in the market.
content:

title: Digital Guardrails: Greece Sets First Binding Rules for AI in Classrooms
description: Greece has enacted its first comprehensive regulatory framework for Artificial Intelligence (AI) in secondary education, establishing a binding set of rules to prevent data exploitation and preserve the human element in teaching.
